sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Creative audio and performance variants
queue.reason: Only expand creative audio if future work adds accessible waveform narration, multi-performer collaboration, richer spatial mixing, recorded-input consent controls, procedural scoring, or deeper arrangement systems rather than more sound labels.

queue.title: Negotiation and coalition variants
queue.reason: Only expand civic negotiation if future work adds multi-player roles, explicit public testimony, accessibility-first deliberation summaries, procedural rules, misinformation response, or deeper long-term policy consequences rather than more proposal labels.

queue.title: Emergency communications variants
queue.reason: Only expand emergency communications if future work adds voice-procedure parsing, multi-operator coordination, accessible spectrum narration, encryption ethics, terrain-aware propagation, or richer message compression rather than more incident labels.

queue.title: Volcano observatory variants
queue.reason: Only expand volcano monitoring if future work adds multi-station triangulation, explicit uncertainty intervals, accessible chart narration, community-specific evacuation ethics, ash and lahar routing, or richer eruption styles rather than more sensor labels.

queue.title: Cultural preservation variants
queue.reason: Only expand archive preservation if future work adds multi-object triage, provenance ethics, nonvisual condition-map narration, community repatriation choices, richer material chemistry, or cooperative treatment planning rather than more artifact labels.

queue.title: Chemistry construction variants
queue.reason: Only expand chemistry play if future work adds isomer goals, reaction balancing, nonvisual structure narration, laboratory safety tradeoffs, cooperative synthesis, or richer electron and charge models rather than more molecule labels.

queue.title: Kitchen orchestration variants
queue.reason: Only expand kitchen management if future work adds dietary constraints, cooperative roles, richer station dependencies, accessible timer narration, inventory forecasting, or multi-course pacing rather than more recipe labels.

queue.title: River delta simulation variants
queue.reason: Only expand delta stewardship if future work adds explicit downstream flow narration, multi-community negotiation, fisheries and navigation tradeoffs, climate scenarios, or richer sediment transport rather than more project labels.

queue.title: Accessible geometry variants
queue.reason: Only expand spatial reasoning if future work adds multi-piece composition, tactile-display guidance, spoken transformation sequences, collaborative proofs, or deeper symmetry and area tradeoffs rather than more silhouettes.

queue.title: Food web simulation variants
queue.reason: Only expand ecological play if future work adds richer trophic uncertainty, accessible relationship narration, multi-pool migration, conservation ethics, or deeper climate and invasive-species tradeoffs rather than more species labels.

queue.title: Transit dispatch variants
queue.reason: Only expand transit play if future work adds accessible route narration, multiple interacting lines, vehicle breakdown recovery, fare and labor ethics, or richer passenger-destination models rather than more station labels.

queue.title: Urban heat planning variants
queue.reason: Only expand civic heat planning if future work adds nonvisual neighborhood summaries, transit and housing displacement tradeoffs, multi-district coordination, public-health ethics, or richer weather and maintenance models rather than more intervention labels.

recentDecisions.title: Foley Stage Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local creative audio-timeline game with four scene contracts, synthesized sound layers, cue timing, drag retiming, intensity and texture choices, studio energy, audience mood, adaptive timing tolerances, scoring, recoverable retakes, session-only sound and Live-mode unlocks, touch, pointer and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Council Commons 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local civic-negotiation strategy game with stakeholder blocs, branching amendments, influence, legitimacy, shocks, scoring and session unlocks.

recentDecisions.title: Emergency Radio Net 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local emergency-communications strategy game with routing, interference, message fidelity, deadlines, recovery and adaptive modes.

recentDecisions.title: Volcano Watch 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local volcano-observatory strategy game with noisy sensors, alerts, trust, preparedness, scoring and branching outcomes.

recentDecisions.title: Archive Rescue Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local cultural-preservation strategy game with diagnosis, environmental controls, reversible treatments and ethical tradeoffs.

recentDecisions.title: Molecule Assembly Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local chemistry construction game with spatial assembly, bonds, valence constraints, contracts and recovery.

recentDecisions.title: Kitchen Pass 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local kitchen-management game with simultaneous orders, station dependencies, timing, quality and recovery.

recentDecisions.title: Delta Steward 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local river-delta simulation with flow, sediment, wetlands, storms, settlements and budget tradeoffs.

recentDecisions.title: Tactile Geometry Workshop 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added an accessible spatial-reasoning workshop with transformations, adaptive puzzles, hints and nonvisual coordinates.

recentDecisions.title: Tidepool Food Web 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local ecological strategy game with species interactions, habitat, pollution, climate shocks and recovery.

recentDecisions.title: Metro Dispatch 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local transit-dispatch game with routing, passenger queues, incidents, energy and equity scoring.

recentDecisions.title: Heat Island Planner 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local urban heat-equity simulation with interventions, escalating heat, maintenance and vulnerable-resident coverage.

recentDecisions.title: Harbor Pilot 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local harbor-piloting game with momentum, wind, current, docking, collision recovery and adaptive modes.
